tagline: Exploring craft, culture, and creative spirit.
voice: Our prose is considered and warm, offering literate insights into the world of design and craft. We aim for sensory and specific descriptions, maintaining an editorial tone that is never breathless or salesy.
logo_style_brief: A hand-drawn inked masthead / decorative drop-cap glyph, brush-and-nib character, high-contrast solid black on white paper, to be vectorized.
photo_style_tokens: candid documentary maker portraits, mixed warm/cool available light, muted earthy tones with one isolated red accent, tactile workshop detail, editorial duotone-ready

facts_from_brief.Feature Profile: four local makers (a ceramicist, a woodworker, a weaver, a metalsmith)
facts_from_brief.Duotone Specs: deep ink shadow and a warm uncoated-paper highlight
facts_from_brief.Accent Use: single saturated accent reserved for the colour-splash pull-quote

invented: Tagline: Exploring craft, culture, and creative spirit.
Industry description: Print quarterly: contemporary craft & culture
Specific font choices (Source Serif Pro for heading, Inter for body)
Names for hex colors (Deep Ink Shadow, Warm Paper Highlight, Near-Black Text, Deep Red Accent)
